productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Printed Dark Navy T-Shirt
description: Style Note Stretchy and comfy room-to-grow style tee from Gini and Jony, a pint-sized version of his dad's T-shirt. The go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades! Product Details Midnight navy T-shirt, has a round neck, short sleeves and polo themed print on front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
